data.name: Once a Porn a Time: Porn and Cards
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the wildest ride in the galaxy!

Once a Porn a Time: Porn and Cards is a NSFW comedy-adventure set in the lawless Galactic West — where blazing guns, dusty saloons, sexy aliens, and deck-building action collide in an explosive mix of story and seduction.

This game features fully explicit erotic content, including full nudity and animated, voice-acted sex scenes. If you’re looking for a bold mix of narrative, strategy, and spicy interstellar action, saddle up — this is your next adventure.

🔥 What’s inside:

  • A wild and witty adult space-western story

  • Strategic card gameplay with NSFW rewards

  • Gorgeous girls (and aliens) ready to reveal their secrets

  • High-quality animation and full voice acting

🕹️ Early Access:

The current version includes approx. 2 hour of gameplay, offering a first taste of the universe.
New updates every two months will expand the story with new chapters, characters, and scenes — until the final release.

🗺️ Roadmap 2025 Highlights:

  • January 17 – Update 01: Early Access Release

  • April 16 – Update 02: The Sheriff, The Lady and the Cards

  • Q2 2025 – Update 03: The Blue Stranger

  • Q2-Q3 2025 – Update 04: She Fucks Like a Bandit

  • TBA – Update 05

You bring the cards. We’ll bring the girls ~~

data.short_description: Once a Porn a Time: Porn and Cards is a NSFW visual novel/turn-based card game/ point and click, with stunning 2D visuals and animations in an immersive narration in the Galactic Wild West

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
